underlying_goal: Redesign the LandLawd landing page with modern, animated, stunning UI design elements and generate project documentation
friction_detail: Claude repeatedly stalled requiring user to prompt 'are you doing anything?' and 'please /resume', and first landing page attempt was too basic requiring a second iteration.
brief_summary: User wanted a stunning animated landing page and project docs for LandLawd; after multiple stalls and one rejected design iteration, Claude delivered typewriter effects, spotlight cards, and full documentation suite.
